description:
Get state of direction stabilization. This command returns [[true]] if the current optic mode of the selected turret has direction stabilization configured in config ({{hl|directionStabilized}}) and if it is also not disabled by [[enableDirectionStabilization]].
This command can not be used to determine if the current optic of the turret has {{hl|directionStabilized}} enabled in config.
name: directionStabilizationEnabled
